versions.version_description: Edited version for playability. there was another version online already which is accurate but unnecessarily hard to play (at least based on UG's generated chord schemes). I've edited this version for more guitar-intuitive chords. I Personally suggest to transpose to -2 semitones and play it with capo on 2 for even better playability.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
23 June 2023 Spotify drop, simplified chords for guitar and piano. 6/8 160bpm.
(c) SWIMS Int. under exclusive license to Warner Records Inc.

[Intro]
[ch]F#m[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                         [ch]A/E[/ch]
  Something's got a hold of me lately, no I don't know myself anymore[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                                              [ch]C#/F[/ch]
  Feels like the walls are all closin' in and the devil's knockin' at my door, whoa[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                                [ch]A/E[/ch]
 Outta my mind, how many times, did I tell you I'm no good at being alone, yeah it's[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                                             [ch]C#/F[/ch]
takin' a toll on me, tryin' my best to keep from tearin' the skin off my bones, don't you know[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]A/E[/ch]
  I lose con...trol, when you're not[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]            [ch]C#sus4/F#[/ch]              [ch]C#/F[/ch]
next to me, I'm fallin' apart right in front of you can't you see[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]A/E[/ch]
  I lose con...trol, when you're not[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                    [ch]C#sus4/F#[/ch]              [ch]C#/F[/ch]
next to me, yeah you're breakin' my heart baby you make a mess of me[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                   [ch]A/E[/ch]
  Problematic, problem is I want your body like a fiend like a bad habit, bad habit's hard to[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                                                     [ch]C#sus4/F#[/ch]
break when I'm with you, yeah I know I could do it on my own but I want that real full[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#/F[/ch]
moon black magic and it takes two[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                [ch]A/E[/ch]
  Problematic, problem is when I'm with you I'm an addict, and I need some[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]                                                           [ch]C#sus4/F#[/ch]
release, my skin in your teeth, can't see the forest through the trees,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C#/F[/ch]
got me down on my knees darlin' please, oh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]A/E[/ch]
  I lose con...trol, when you're not[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]            [ch]C#sus4/F#[/ch]              [ch]C#/F[/ch]
next to me, I'm fallin' apart right in front of you can't you see[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]A/E[/ch]
  I lose con...trol, when you're not[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                    [ch]C#sus4/F#[/ch]              [ch]C#/F[/ch]
next to me, yeah you're breakin' my heart baby you make a mess of me, yeah[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]A/E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]C#sus4/F#[/ch] [ch]C#/F[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]A/E[/ch]
  I lose con...trol, when you're not[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]              [ch]C#sus4/F#[/ch]              [ch]C#/F[/ch]
here with me, I'm fallin' apart right in front of you can't you see[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]A/E[/ch]
  I lose con...trol, when you're not[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                      [ch]C#sus4/F#[/ch]              [ch]C#/F[/ch]
here with me, yeah you're breakin' my heart baby you make a mess of me[/tab]
